block.offroad.wheel_mount.tooltip.behavi: _Steers_ the wheel toward the _side the signal is from_.
block.offroad.wheel_mount.tooltip.summar: Mounts _wheel-like_ items to allow for ground travel.
item.offroad.tire.placement_error: Must be placed on the front of a Wheel Mount!
offroad.exceptions.borehead_bearing.insu: Attached structure does not include any _inventory_ blocks.

Attached structure does not include any _Rock Cutting_ _Wheels_:
A minimum of _one_ is required.
offroad.exceptions.borehead_bearing.too_: This contraption is unable to excavate.
There is _insufficient_ _storage_ to gather more blocks. _Remove_ excess items in order to continue excavating.
offroad.ponder.borehead_bearing_efficien: The more blocks a Borehead Bearing attempts to break, the slower it will operate
Using multiple Borehead Bearings can offset this
offroad.ponder.borehead_bearing_excavati: Unlike regular Drills, Rock Cutting Wheels break blocks in a range around themselves
offroad.ponder.borehead_bearing_intro.he: Using Borehead Bearings and Rock Cutting Wheels
offroad.ponder.borehead_bearing_intro.te: Borehead Bearings attach to the block in front of them
When a Storage Container and Rock Cutting Wheels are present, it can be used as a Drill
Rock Cutting Wheels will automatically attach to blocks and each other without need of Super Glue
The Borehead Bearing reverses the direction of Rotation...
...and spins at 0.25x the provided Rotational Speed
The mining speed depends on the Rotational Input...
...and drops are collected into the drill Storage automatically
When the drill Storage is full, it will be unable to continue breaking blocks
To remedy this, items can be extracted directly from the Borehead Bearing
